commands.review_summary:
The PR changes package-manager detection to classify roots with `npm-shrinkwrap.json` and no `pnpm-lock.yaml` as npm, adds an npm shrinkwrap deps-status fallback, and adds regression tests.

PR surface: Source +21, Tests +36. Total +57 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection and the linked report: current main reads `packageManager` before lockfiles, so the reported npm global install shape with `packageManager: pnpm@...`, `npm-shrinkwrap.json`, and no `pnpm-lock.yaml` follows the wrong pnpm path. I did not run a live npm global install in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor-supplied real OpenClaw proof or maintainer acceptance of source-level coverage; there is no narrow automated code repair to queue.
